q1_sink_dangerous.evidence: Sink is _os.system() executing a shell command constructed from user input, which is shell execution.

mock_guidance.target: Mock or record the call to _os.system() on line 185.
mock_guidance.capture: Capture the full command string argument passed to _os.system(), specifically the concatenated "ping -c 1 " + host value, to verify whether user-controlled input from request.GET.get('host') is injected without sanitization.
mock_guidance.fake_behavior: Return 0 to simulate a successful ping without executing any real shell command, allowing execution to continue to the JsonResponse return.
notes: The underlying os module is imported as _os in this codebase; mock at the _os attribute level.
Ensure the mock does not interfere with any other os module usage if present in the test scope.
